revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Bovidae in Chinese mythology); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bovidae_in_Chinese_mythology here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bovidae_in_Chinese_mythology for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1200297709 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Bovidae in Chinese mythology | revid=1200297709 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject China}} {{WikiProject Mythology|importance=low}} }}
==Bovidae in culture versus myth== Unlike e.g. "[[Monkeys in Chinese culture]]", I wouldn't feel safe with *"Bovidae in Chinese culture" without being prepared to include a lot of veterinarian information. [[User:Dcattell|Dcattell]] ([[User talk:Dcattell|talk]]) 21:38, 8 January 2015 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==Delete, Move, or renovate== This article has barely changed since its original in 2015. At least the original mentioned a little bit about mythology. This article is so focused on the taxonomy indicated by "Bovidae" that it's completely forgot what it's about. I'm going to add a little bit to try to kick it into gear, but what I really want is for all of this scientific nonsense to be erased- because it doesn't belong here. That belongs in articles related to the animals themselves, like [[Bovidae]], or [[Père David's deer|Pere David's deer]], or [[List of mammals of China]]. What this article is supposed to be about is mythology; oral and written literature and religion. And it's not. I think it should be deleted. But there is worth in understanding hoofed animals in Chinese mythology and religion for its own article, but I think it should be "Ruminants in Chinese mythology" or "Hoofed animals in Chinese mythology". This would allow horses, deer, camels, and mythological mish-mashed creatures in here (and really, qilin aren't actually bovids. They fall out of the taxonomic system for real creatures of Earth). Otherwise, let's erase a good portion of the science-blah, leaving only a little bit necessary for categorization (or we could just call them goats, sheep, cattle, etc) and then fill it to the brim with Chinese lore.[[User:Wacape|Wacape]] ([[User talk:Wacape|talk]]) 07:27, 24 December 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
